nasb.text: The firstborn bore a son, and called his name Moab; he is the father of the Moabites to this day.

esv.text: The firstborn bore a son and called his name Moab.  He is the father of the Moabites to this day.

cnv.text: 大女兒生了一個兒子，給他起名叫摩押，就是現在摩押人的始祖。

ccb.text: 大女儿生了一个儿子，给他取名叫摩押，他是今天摩押人的祖先。

csbs.text: 大女儿生了一个儿子，给他起名为摩押，他就是今天摩押人的祖先。
